title: 20:10 ГўВЂВ” April 27, 2020
body_text:
20:10 ГўВЂВ” April 27, 2020
Update to Cash Services Procedures
We revised and added new content as described in the table below to clarify Cash Services procedures.
The Cash Services Procedures ГўВЂВ“ Quick Reference Guide, Form 9031, was created as a temporary resource for financial institutions that have migrated to Cash Services. The procedures include how to use the Cash Services system when creating and managing users and cash orders.
When all financial institutions have migrated to Cash Services, we will combine procedures in the Payment Solutions Manual in a new Part that applies to both provinces. In the meantime, we will continue updating the Cash Services Procedures ГўВЂВ“ Quick Reference Guide, Form 9031, as additional features become available for financial institutions that have migrated to the new system.
As an additional resource, you can view the
Cash Services Training Videos
.
Document Library
Status
Cash Services Procedures ГўВЂВ“ Quick Reference Guide
9031
Chapter 1, Introduction to Cash Services
We added that the Cash Services system has no time limitations ГўВЂВ” it is available anytime, seven days a week.
Revised
Section 1.1, Cash Services User Types
We added the Access Management user as an additional user type configured for financial institutions in Cash Services.
Chapter 2, Creating and Maintaining Profiles
We clarified that the Admin and the Access Management users can only create or modify profiles for other users who have access to the same locations.
We replaced the image for Figure 2.4 and added a note to clarify that financial institutions are restricted to the three ГўВЂВњeClientГўВЂВќ user types (the ГўВЂВњBranchГўВЂВќ user types, although visible, are not configured for financial institution use).
Section 3.1, Entering a Cash Order
We added details surrounding the default fields on the Order Entry screen.
Section 3.2, Managing Cash Orders
Pending & Ready subsection
ГўВЂВ“ We added details and images for modifying and deleting orders.
Carrier Check & Released subsection
ГўВЂВ“ We clarified that the Delivery Date in the search criteria is considered the ГўВЂВњfromГўВЂВќ date.
Chapter 4, Cash Services Settlement Reports
We added this Chapter.
Chapter 5, Frequently Asked Questions
We added this Chapter.
